folio.label: 118r
folio.l: That he of wo~men wrot , a botirflye
I am a wo~man , nedes must I speke
Or ellis swelle , til myn hert breke
For sithe he seide , that we ben iangelers
As euäe hole mote I , brouke my tresses
I shal nat spare , for no curteisie
To speke hi~ harm , that wolde vs velanye
Dame q¶ this Pluto , be no lengere wrotú
I ©eue it vp , but sithe I swor myn otú
That I wolde gunt hi~ , his sigút a ©eyne
My word shal stonde , I warne ©ow certeyne
I am a kyngö , it syt me nougút to lye
And I q¶ she , a Quene of fayrie
Hire answere shal she haue , I vndertake
Lat vs no moo wordes , here of make
For sothe I wyl no lengere , ©ow contrarie
¢ Now late vs turne a ©ein , to Ianuarie
That in the gardeyn , witú hise fair May
Syngetú ful meriere , than the Popyngay
ñow loue I best , and shal , and other noon
So longe a boute the Aleys , is he gon
Til he was come a geyn , to thilke perye
Where as this Damyan , sittetú ful merye
And heygú , a mongö theise fressú leues grene
This fressú May , that is so brigút and shene
Gan for to sigúe , and seide allas my syde
Now sire q¶ she , for ougút that may betide
I must haue on of the peeres , that I se
Or I mot deye , so sore longetú me
To eten , of the smale peeres grene
Helpe for hire loue , that is heuene Quene
I telle ©ow wel , a wo~man in my pligút
May haue to fruyt , so gret an appetit´
That she may deyen , but she it haue
Allas q¶ he , that I haue here no knaue
That coude clymbe , allas allas q¶ he
For I am blynde , ©e sire no force q¶ she
But wolde ©e vouche saf , for goddis sake
The Perie , witú Inne ©oure armes , for to take
Ful wel I wote , that ©e mys trosttntrostentrostten me1099 trosten. e is possibly a correction from r?.JRT Double check, just in case/ODR/
Than shulde I clymbe , wel I now q¶ she
So I my fote , may sette vp oon ©oure bak
Certes q¶ he , ther of shal be no lak
Mygút I ©ow helpen , witú myn hert blode
He stouped doun , and she vp on his bak stode
And caugút hire by a twist , and vp she gotú

note.notetxt: 1105the last three lines are crammed. Also note the ink in these pages f.118r/117v is dark brown.ODR
